Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**

This file contains a formalization of multisorted binding signatures:

- Definition of multisorted binding signatures ([MultiSortedSig])
- Construction of a functor from a multisorted binding signature
  ([MultiSortedSigToFunctor])
- Construction of signature with strength from a multisorted binding
  signature ([MultiSortedSigToSignature])
- Proof that the functor obtained from a multisorted binding signature
  is omega-cocontinuous ([is_omega_cocont_MultiSortedSigToFunctor])

The construction of a monad on C^sort from a multisorted signature and the
instantiation of MultiSortedSigToMonad for C = Set are now found in
[UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedMonadConstruction_alt].


Written by: Anders Mörtberg, 2021. The formalization is an adaptation of
Multisorted.

some adaptions in preparation of actegorical approach done in 2023 by Ralph Matthes

*)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Lists.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.All.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Structures.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.StandardCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Groupoids.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SumOfSignatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.BinProductOfSignatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SignatureExamples.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedBindingSig.
Require UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SortIndexing.

Local Open Scope cat.

(* These should be global *)
Arguments Gθ_Signature {_ _ _ _} _ _.
Arguments Signature_Functor {_ _ _} _.
Arguments BinProduct_of_functors {_ _} _ _ _.
Arguments DL_comp {_ _} _ {_} _.
Arguments θ_from_δ_Signature {_ _} _.
Arguments BinProduct_of_Signatures {_ _ _} _ _ _.
Arguments Sum_of_Signatures _ {_ _ _} _ _.


(** * Definition of multisorted binding signatures *)
Section MBindingSig.

(* Interestingly we only need that [sort] is a 1-type *)
Context (sort : UU) (Hsort : isofhlevel 3 sort) (C : category).

(* Assumptions on [C] used to construct the functor *)
(* Note that there is some redundancy in the assumptions *)
Context (TC : Terminal C) (IC : Initial C)
        (BP : BinProducts C) (BC : BinCoproducts C)
        (* (PC : forall (I : UU), Products I C) *) (eqsetPC : forall (s s' : sort), Products (s=s') C)
        (CC : forall (I : UU), isaset I → Coproducts I C).

Local Notation "'1'" := (TerminalObject TC).
Local Notation "a ⊕ b" := (BinCoproductObject (BC a b)).

(** Define the category of sorts *)
Let sort_cat : category := SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort.

(** This represents "sort → C" *)
Let sortToC : category := SortIndexing.sortToC sort Hsort C.

Let make_sortToC (f : sort → C) : sortToC := SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f.

Let make_sortToC_mor (ξ ξ' : sortToC) (fam : ∏ s: sort, pr1 ξ s --> pr1 ξ' s) : sortToC⟦ξ,ξ'⟧
    := SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort Hsort C ξ ξ' fam.

Let BCsortToC : BinCoproducts sortToC := SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort _ BC.

Let sortToCC : category := SortIndexing.sortToCC sort Hsort C.
Let TsortToCC : Terminal sortToCC := SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC.

Let BPsortToCC : BinProducts sortToCC := SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort _ BP.

Let sortToC2 : category := SortIndexing.sortToC2 sort Hsort C.

(* Assumptions needed to prove ω-cocontinuity of the functor *)
Context (EsortToCC : Exponentials BPsortToCC)
        (HC : Colims_of_shape nat_graph C).
(* The EsortToCC assumption says that [sortToC,C] has exponentials. It
   could be reduced to exponentials in C, but we only have the case
   for C = Set formalized in

     CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Structures.Exponentials_functor_HSET

*)

Definition CoproductsMultiSortedSig_base (M : MultiSortedSig sort) : Coproducts (ops _ M) sortToC
  := SortIndexing.CCsortToC sort Hsort C CC _ (setproperty (ops sort M)).

Definition CoproductsMultiSortedSig (M : MultiSortedSig sort) : Coproducts (ops _ M) [sortToC,sortToC]
  := SortIndexing.CCsortToC2 sort Hsort C CC _ (setproperty (ops sort M)).


(** * Construction of an endofunctor on [C^sort,C^sort] from a multisorted signature *)
Section functor.

(** Given a sort s this applies the sortToC to s and returns C *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
sortToC ⟶ C


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
sortToC ⟶ C


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
functor_data sortToC C
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_functor ?F

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
sortToC → C
 intro ξ; apply (pr1 ξ s).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ a b : sortToC,
sortToC ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ C ⟦ (λ ξ : sortToC, pr1 ξ s) a,
  (λ ξ : sortToC, pr1 ξ s) b ⟧
 simpl; intros a b ξ; apply (ξ s).

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_functor
  (make_functor_data (λ ξ : sortToC, pr1 ξ s)
     ((λ (a : ((sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : sort, pathscomp0)) ⟶ C)
       (b : ((sort,, (λ x y : sort, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod (λ c : sort, idpath c)
               (λ a0 b c : sort, pathscomp0)) ⟶ C)
       (ξ : a ⟹ b), ξ s)
      :
      ∏ a b : sortToC,
      sortToC ⟦ a, b ⟧
      → C ⟦ (λ ξ : sortToC, pr1 ξ s) a,
        (λ ξ : sortToC, pr1 ξ s) b ⟧))
 abstract (split; intros ξ *; apply idpath).
Defined.

(** not needed here - illustration that also the sort can vary *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
sortToC ⟶ sortToC

C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,

SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
sortToC ⟶ sortToC

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
functor_data sortToC sortToC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

is_functor ?F

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

s: sort
C

      exact (pr1 ξ (f s)).
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
∏ a b : sortToC,
sortToC ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ sortToC
  ⟦ (λ ξ : sortToC,
     make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ (f s))) a,
  (λ ξ : sortToC,
   make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ (f s))) b ⟧
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
ξ, ξ': sortToC
h: sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
sortToC
⟦ (λ ξ : sortToC,
   make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ (f s))) ξ,
(λ ξ : sortToC, make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ (f s)))
  ξ' ⟧

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
ξ, ξ': sortToC
h: sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
∏ s : sort,
C ⟦ pr1 (make_sortToC (λ s0 : sort, pr1 ξ (f s0))) s,
pr1 (make_sortToC (λ s0 : sort, pr1 ξ' (f s0))) s ⟧

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
ξ, ξ': sortToC
h: sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
s: sort
C ⟦ pr1 (make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ (f s))) s,
pr1 (make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ' (f s))) s ⟧

      exact (pr1 h (f s)).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
f: sort → sort
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     (λ ξ : sortToC,
      make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ (f s)))
     (λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC) (h : sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧),
      make_sortToC_mor
        (make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ (f s)))
        (make_sortToC (λ s : sort, pr1 ξ' (f s)))
        (λ s : sort, pr1 h (f s))))
 abstract (split; red; intros; apply nat_trans_eq; try (apply C);
      intro t; apply idpath).
Defined.

(* The left adjoint to projSortToC *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
C ⟶ sortToC


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
C ⟶ sortToC

C: category
TC: Terminal C

BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

C

    use (CoproductObject (t = s) C (CC _ (Hsort t s) (λ _, A))).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ sortToC
  ⟦ (λ A : C,
     make_sortToC
       (λ s : sort,
        CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A))) a,
  (λ A : C,
   make_sortToC
     (λ s : sort,
      CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A))) b ⟧

a, b: C

sortToC
⟦ (λ A : C,
   make_sortToC
     (λ s : sort,
      CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A))) a,
(λ A : C,

    CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A))) b ⟧

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
s: sort
C
⟦ make_sortToC
    (λ s : sort,
     CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, a)) s,
make_sortToC
  (λ s : sort, CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, b))
  s ⟧

    apply CoproductOfArrows; intros p; apply f.

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort,
         CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         CoproductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort,
         CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         CoproductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort,
         CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         CoproductOfArrows 
           (t = s) C
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort,
         CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         CoproductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))
 abstract (intros x; apply nat_trans_eq_alt; intros s;
    apply pathsinv0, CoproductArrowUnique; intros p;
    now rewrite id_left, id_right).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort,
         CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         CoproductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (CC (t = s) (Hsort t s) (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))
 abstract (intros x y z f g; apply nat_trans_eq_alt; intros s;
    apply pathsinv0, CoproductArrowUnique; intros p; cbn;
    now rewrite assoc, (CoproductOfArrowsIn _ _ (CC _ (Hsort t s) (λ _, x))),
            <- !assoc, (CoproductOfArrowsIn _ _ (CC _ (Hsort t s) (λ _, y)))).
Defined.


(* The option functor (without decidable equality) *)
Section Sorted_Option_Functor.

Context (s : sort).


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
sortToC

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
sortToC


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s, t: sort
C

(* Instead of an if-then-else we use a coproduct over "s = t". This lets us
avoid assuming decidable equality for sort *)
exact (CoproductObject (t = s) C (CC _ (Hsort t s) (λ _, 1))).
Defined.

Definition sorted_option_functor : functor sortToC sortToC :=
  constcoprod_functor1 BCsortToC option_fun_summand.

(** the following two definitions are currently not used *)

Local Definition Some_sorted_option_functor : functor_identity sortToC ⟹ sorted_option_functor :=
  BinCoproductIn2 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ BCsortToC
                                                  (constant_functor _ _ option_fun_summand)
                                                  (functor_identity sortToC)).


Local Definition None_sorted_option_functor : constant_functor _ _ option_fun_summand ⟹ sorted_option_functor :=
  BinCoproductIn1 (BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ BCsortToC
                                                  (constant_functor _ _ option_fun_summand)
                                                  (functor_identity sortToC)).

End Sorted_Option_Functor.


(** Sorted option functor for lists *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list sort
sortToC2


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list sort
sortToC2

(* This should be [foldr1] or [foldr1_map] in order to avoid composing with the
   identity functor on the right in the base case *)
use (foldr1_map (λ F G, F ∙ G) (functor_identity _) sorted_option_functor xs).
Defined.


(** Define a functor

F^(l,t)(X) := projSortToC(t) ∘ X ∘ sorted_option_functor(l)

if l is nonempty and

F^(l,t)(X) := projSortToC(t) ∘ X

otherwise
 *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
lt: list sort × sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

BC: BinCoproducts C

  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
l: list sort

(* use list_ind to do a case on whether l is empty or not *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
(λ _ : list sort, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC) nil
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
∏ (x : sort) (xs : list sort),
(λ _ : list sort, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC) xs
→ (λ _ : list sort, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC) (cons x xs)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
(λ _ : list sort, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC) nil
 exact (post_comp_functor (projSortToC t)).

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
∏ (x : sort) (xs : list sort),
(λ _ : list sort, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC) xs
→ (λ _ : list sort, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC) (cons x xs)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t, s: sort
l: list sort
(λ _ : list sort, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC) (cons s l)

  exact (pre_comp_functor (option_list (cons s l)) ∙ post_comp_functor (projSortToC t)).
Defined.

(** This defines F^lts where lts is a list of (l,t). Outputs a product of
    functors if the list is nonempty and otherwise the constant functor. *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC

  (* If the list is empty we output the constant functor *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC

(* This should be [foldr1] or [foldr1_map] in order to avoid composing with the
   constant functor in the base case *)
exact (foldr1_map (λ F G, BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToCC F G) T exp_functor xs).
Defined.


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
lt1, lt2: list sort × sort
xs: list (list sort × sort)
exp_functor_list (cons lt2 (cons lt1 xs)) =
BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToCC (exp_functor lt2)
  (exp_functor_list (cons lt1 xs))


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
lt1, lt2: list sort × sort
xs: list (list sort × sort)
exp_functor_list (cons lt2 (cons lt1 xs)) =
BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToCC (exp_functor lt2)
  (exp_functor_list (cons lt1 xs))

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition hat_exp_functor_list (xst : list (list sort × sort) × sort) :
  functor sortToC2 sortToC2 :=
    exp_functor_list (pr1 xst) ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functor (pr2 xst)).

(** The function from multisorted signatures to functors *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
ops sort M → sortToC2 ⟶ [sortToC, sortToC]

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
op: ops sort M
sortToC2 ⟶ [sortToC, sortToC]

  exact (hat_exp_functor_list (arity _ M op)).
Defined.

End functor.

(** * Construction of the strength for the endofunctor on [C^sort,C^sort]
      derived from a multisorted signature *)
Section strength.

(* The distributive law for sorted_option_functor *)
Definition DL_sorted_option_functor (s : sort) :
  DistributiveLaw sortToC (sorted_option_functor s) :=
    genoption_DistributiveLaw sortToC (option_fun_summand s) BCsortToC.

(* The DL for option_list *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list sort
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list xs)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list sort
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list xs)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: Vectors.vec sort 0
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list (0,, xs))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
n: nat
xs: Vectors.vec sort (S n)
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list (S n,, xs))


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: Vectors.vec sort 0
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list (0,, xs))
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list (0,, tt))

  apply DL_id.

  (option_list (S n,, xs))

  (option_list (S (S n),, xs))

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
n: nat
m, k: sort
xs: Vectors.vec sort n
IH: ∏ xs : Vectors.vec sort (S n),
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list (S n,, xs))
DistributiveLaw [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  (option_list (S (S n),, m,, k,, xs))

    apply (DL_comp (DL_sorted_option_functor m) (IH (k,,xs))).
Defined.

(* The signature for exp_functor *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
lt: list sort × sort
Signature sortToC C sortToC

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C

BC: BinCoproducts C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

StrengthForSignature (exp_functor lt)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
∏ l : list sort,
StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (l,, t))


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

(λ xs : list sort,
 StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (xs,, t))) nil
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
∏ (x : sort) (xs : list sort),
(λ xs0 : list sort,
 StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (xs0,, t))) xs
→ (λ xs0 : list sort,
   StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (xs0,, t)))
    (cons x xs)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
(λ xs : list sort,
 StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (xs,, t))) nil
 exact (pr2 (Gθ_Signature (IdSignature _ _) (projSortToC t))).

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
∏ (x : sort) (xs : list sort),
(λ xs0 : list sort,
 StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (xs0,, t))) xs
→ (λ xs0 : list sort,
   StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (xs0,, t)))
    (cons x xs)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t, x: sort
xs: list sort
H: (λ xs : list sort,
 StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (xs,, t))) xs
Sig_option_list:= θ_from_δ_Signature
  (DL_option_list (cons x xs)): Signature
  [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
  [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
StrengthForSignature (exp_functor (cons x xs,, t))

  apply (pr2 (Gθ_Signature Sig_option_list (projSortToC t))).
Defined.

Sig_exp_functor lt = exp_functor lt

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

Sig_exp_functor lt = exp_functor lt

apply idpath.
Qed.

→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
n: nat
xs: Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) (S (S n))
IH: ∏ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) (S n),
StrengthForSignature
  (exp_functor_list (S n,, xs))
StrengthForSignature (exp_functor_list (S (S n),, xs))

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) 1
StrengthForSignature (exp_functor_list (1%nat,, xs))

  (exp_functor_list (1%nat,, m,, tt))

    exact (pr2 (Sig_exp_functor m)).

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort

  (exp_functor_list (S n,, xs))
