BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
MultiSortedSigToSignature M =
MultiSortedSigToFunctor M

apply idpath.
Qed.

End strength.


(** * Proof that the functor obtained from a multisorted signature is omega-cocontinuous *)
Section omega_cocont.

(* Direct definition of the right adjoint to projSortToC *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
C ⟶ sortToC

    exact (ProductObject (t = s) C (eqsetPC _ _ (λ _, A))).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ sortToC
  ⟦ (λ A : C,
     make_sortToC
       (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A))) a,
  (λ A : C,
   make_sortToC
     (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A))) b ⟧

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
sortToC
⟦ (λ A : C,
   make_sortToC
     (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A))) a,
(λ A : C,
 make_sortToC
   (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A))) b ⟧

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
s: sort
C
⟦ make_sortToC
    (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, a)) s,
make_sortToC
  (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, b)) s ⟧

    apply ProductOfArrows; intros p; apply f.

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         ProductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         ProductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         ProductOfArrows 
           (t = s) C (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         ProductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))
 abstract (intros x; apply nat_trans_eq_alt; intros s;
    apply pathsinv0, ProductArrowUnique; intros p;
    now rewrite id_left, id_right).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
t: sort
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ A : C,
      make_sortToC
        (λ s : sort, eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, A)))
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      nat_trans_functor_path_pregroupoid
        (λ s : sort,
         ProductOfArrows (t = s) C
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, b))
           (eqsetPC t s (λ _ : t = s, a))
           (λ _ : t = s, f))))
 abstract(intros x y z f g; apply nat_trans_eq_alt; intros s; cbn;
    now rewrite ProductOfArrows_comp).
Defined.


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_left_adjoint (projSortToC s)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C

BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

A: sortToC
sortToC ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A,
(projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A ⟧

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
  ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
is_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
  ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A) 
  ?t

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
  ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
 intros t; apply ProductArrow; intros p; induction p; apply identity.
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
is_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
  ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
  ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
    ProductArrow (s = t) C
      (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
      (λ p : s = t,
       paths_rect sort s
         (λ (t0 : sort) (_ : s = t0),
          C ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A t0,
          projSortToC s A ⟧)
         (identity (projSortToC s A)) t p))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
     ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A))
 abstract (now intros a b []; rewrite id_right, (functor_id A), id_left).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC)
  (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s)
  ((λ A : sortToC,
    make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
      ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
      ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        ProductArrow (s = t) C
          (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
          (λ p : s = t,
           paths_rect sort s
             (λ (t0 : sort) (_ : s = t0),
              C ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A t0,
              projSortToC s A ⟧)
             (identity (projSortToC s A)) t p))
       :
       nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
         ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A))
      (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof s A))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC)
     (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s))
 abstract (intros A B F; apply nat_trans_eq_alt; intros t; cbn;
    rewrite precompWithProductArrow, postcompWithProductArrow;
    apply ProductArrowUnique; intros []; cbn;
    now rewrite (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ (eqsetPC _ _ (λ _, pr1 B s))), id_left, id_right).

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s ⟹ functor_identity C

C: category

  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort

TC: Terminal C

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: C
C ⟦ (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s) A,
functor_identity C A ⟧

    exact (ProductPr _ _ (eqsetPC _  _ (λ _, A)) (idpath _)).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_nat_trans (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
  (functor_identity C)
  ((λ A : C,
    ProductPr (s = s) C (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, A))
      (idpath s))
   :
   nat_trans_data (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
     (functor_identity C))
 abstract (now intros a b f; cbn; rewrite (ProductOfArrowsPr _ _ (eqsetPC _  _ (λ _, b)))).

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
form_adjunction (projSortToC s) (projSortToC_rad s)
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC)
     (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s)
     ((λ A : sortToC,
       make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
         ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
         ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           ProductArrow (s = t) C
             (eqsetPC s t
                (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
             (λ p : s = t,
              paths_rect sort s
                (λ (t0 : sort) (_ : s = t0),
                 C ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A t0,
                 projSortToC s A ⟧)
                (identity (projSortToC s A)) t p))
          :
          nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
            ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A))
         (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof s A))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC)
        (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s))
     (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof0 s))
  (make_nat_trans (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
     (functor_identity C)
     ((λ A : C,
       ProductPr (s = s) C
         (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, A)) (idpath s))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
        (functor_identity C))
     (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof1 s))
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ a : sortToC,
# (projSortToC s)
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC)
     (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s)
     ((λ A : sortToC,
       make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
         ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
         ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           ProductArrow (s = t) C
             (eqsetPC s t
                (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
             (λ p : s = t,
              paths_rect sort s
                (λ (t0 : sort) (_ : s = t0),
                 C ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A t0,
                 projSortToC s A ⟧)
                (identity (projSortToC s A)) t p))
          :
          nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
            ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A))
         (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof s A))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC)
        (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s))
     (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof0 s) a)
· make_nat_trans (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
    (functor_identity C)
    ((λ A : C,
      ProductPr (s = s) C
        (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, A)) (idpath s))
     :
     nat_trans_data
       (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
       (functor_identity C))
    (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof1 s)
    (projSortToC s a) = identity (projSortToC s a)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ b : C,
make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC)
  (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s)
  ((λ A : sortToC,
    make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
      ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
      ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        ProductArrow (s = t) C
          (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
          (λ p : s = t,
           paths_rect sort s
             (λ (t0 : sort) 
              (_ : s = t0),
              C ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A t0,
              projSortToC s A ⟧)
             (identity (projSortToC s A)) t p))
       :
       nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
         ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A))
      (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof s A))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC)
     (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s))
  (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof0 s)
  (projSortToC_rad s b)
· # (projSortToC_rad s)
    (make_nat_trans
       (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
       (functor_identity C)
       ((λ A : C,
         ProductPr (s = s) C
           (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, A)) 
           (idpath s))
        :
        nat_trans_data
          (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
          (functor_identity C))
       (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof1 s) b) =
identity (projSortToC_rad s b)

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ a : sortToC,
# (projSortToC s)
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC)
     (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s)
     ((λ A : sortToC,
       make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
         ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
         ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           ProductArrow (s = t) C
             (eqsetPC s t
                (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
             (λ p : s = t,
              paths_rect sort s
                (λ (t0 : sort) (_ : s = t0),
                 C ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A t0,
                 projSortToC s A ⟧)
                (identity (projSortToC s A)) t p))
          :
          nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
            ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A))
         (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof s A))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC)
        (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s))
     (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof0 s) a)
· make_nat_trans (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
    (functor_identity C)
    ((λ A : C,
      ProductPr (s = s) C
        (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, A)) (idpath s))
     :
     nat_trans_data
       (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
       (functor_identity C))
    (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof1 s)
    (projSortToC s a) = identity (projSortToC s a)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
ProductArrow (s = s) C
  (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, pr1 A s))
  (λ p : s = s,
   paths_rect sort s
     (λ (t : sort) (_ : s = t), C ⟦ A t, pr1 A s ⟧)
     (identity (pr1 A s)) s p)
· ProductPr (s = s) C
    (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, pr1 A s)) (idpath s) =
identity (pr1 A s)

    now rewrite (ProductPrCommutes _ _ _ (eqsetPC _  _ (λ _, pr1 A s))).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ b : C,
make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC)
  (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s)
  ((λ A : sortToC,
    make_nat_trans (functor_identity sortToC A)
      ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A)
      ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        ProductArrow (s = t) C
          (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
          (λ p : s = t,
           paths_rect sort s
             (λ (t0 : sort) (_ : s = t0),
              C ⟦ functor_identity sortToC A t0,
              projSortToC s A ⟧)
             (identity (projSortToC s A)) t p))
       :
       nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC A)
         ((projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s) A))
      (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof s A))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity sortToC)
     (projSortToC s ∙ projSortToC_rad s))
  (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof0 s)
  (projSortToC_rad s b)
· # (projSortToC_rad s)
    (make_nat_trans
       (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
       (functor_identity C)
       ((λ A : C,
         ProductPr (s = s) C
           (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, A)) (idpath s))
        :
        nat_trans_data
          (projSortToC_rad s ∙ projSortToC s)
          (functor_identity C))
       (is_left_adjoint_projSortToC_subproof1 s) b) =
identity (projSortToC_rad s b)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
c: C
t: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
ProductArrow (s = t) C
  (eqsetPC s t
     (λ _ : s = t, eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c)))
  (λ p : s = t,
   paths_rect sort s
     (λ (t : sort) (_ : s = t),
      C ⟦ eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, c),
      eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c) ⟧)
     (identity (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c))) t p)
· ProductOfArrows (s = t) C
    (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, c))
    (eqsetPC s t
       (λ _ : s = t, eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c)))
    (λ _ : s = t,
     ProductPr (s = s) C
       (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c)) (idpath s)) =
identity (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, c))

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
c: C
t: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
ProductArrow (s = t) C (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, c))
  (λ i : s = t,
   paths_rect sort s
     (λ (t : sort) (_ : s = t),
      C ⟦ eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, c),
      eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c) ⟧)
     (identity (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c))) t i
   · ProductPr (s = s) C
       (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c)) (idpath s)) =
identity (eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, c))

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
c: C
t: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
identity (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c))
· ProductPr (s = s) C (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c))
    (idpath s) =
paths_rect sort s
  (λ (t : sort) (_ : s = t),
   C ⟦ eqsetPC s t (λ _ : s = t, c),
   eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c) ⟧)
  (identity (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c))) s
  (idpath s)
· ProductPr (s = s) C (eqsetPC s s (λ _ : s = s, c))
    (idpath s)

    now rewrite !id_left.
Qed.


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_omega_cocont (post_comp_functor (projSortToC s))

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort

BC: BinCoproducts C

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

is_omega_cocont (post_comp_functor (projSortToC s))


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_left_adjoint (projSortToC s)

apply is_left_adjoint_projSortToC.
Defined.


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
a: list sort × sort
is_omega_cocont (exp_functor a)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
a: list sort × sort
is_omega_cocont (exp_functor a)

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

∏ (x : sort) (xs : list sort),
(λ xs0 : list sort,
 is_omega_cocont (exp_functor (xs0,, t))) xs
→ (λ xs0 : list sort,
   is_omega_cocont (exp_functor (xs0,, t)))
    (cons x xs)

   is_omega_cocont (exp_functor (xs0,, t)))

  (pre_comp_functor
     (option_list
        (cons (pr1 (pr2 (cons x xs)))
           (pr1 xs,, pr2 (pr2 (cons x xs))))))

SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

t, x: sort
xs: list sort

 is_omega_cocont (exp_functor (xs,, t))) xs

 apply is_omega_cocont_post_comp_projSortToC.
Defined.

TC: Terminal C

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

is_omega_cocont (exp_functor_list xs)

BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
is_omega_cocont
  (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
∏ a : list sort × sort,
is_omega_cocont (exp_functor a)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
∏ (a : list sort × sort) 
(res : sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC),
is_omega_cocont res
→ is_omega_cocont
    (BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToCC 
       (exp_functor a) res)

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
is_omega_cocont
  (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC)
 apply is_omega_cocont_constant_functor.

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

 apply is_omega_cocont_exp_functor.
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
∏ (a : list sort × sort) (res : sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC),
is_omega_cocont res
→ is_omega_cocont
    (BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToCC (exp_functor a)
       res)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
lt: list sort × sort
F: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
Hyp: is_omega_cocont F
is_omega_cocont
  (BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToCC (exp_functor lt)
     F)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

BinProducts sortToC2
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC

TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
lt: list sort × sort
F: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
Hyp: is_omega_cocont F
∏ x : sortToCC,
is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor1 BPsortToCC x)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

BC: BinCoproducts C

is_omega_cocont F

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
lt: list sort × sort
F: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
Hyp: is_omega_cocont F
BinProducts sortToC2
 apply BinProducts_functor_precat, BinProducts_functor_precat, BP.

  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
lt: list sort × sort

Exponentials BPsortToCC

      apply EsortToCC.
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
lt: list sort × sort
F: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
Hyp: is_omega_cocont F
is_omega_cocont (exp_functor lt)
 apply is_omega_cocont_exp_functor.
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
lt: list sort × sort
F: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
Hyp: is_omega_cocont F
is_omega_cocont F
 exact Hyp.
Defined.

(* The hat_functor is left adjoint to projSortToC *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_left_adjoint (hat_functor s)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_left_adjoint (hat_functor s)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
are_adjoints (hat_functor s) (projSortToC s)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,

→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
functor_identity C ⟹ hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

⟹ functor_identity sortToC
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

form_adjunction (hat_functor s) 
  (projSortToC s) ?eta ?eps

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,

→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
  (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s) 
  ?t

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
  (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: C
C ⟦ functor_identity C A,
(hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s) A ⟧

    exact (CoproductIn _ _ (CC (s = s) _ (λ _, A)) (idpath _)).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
  (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s)
  ((λ A : C,
    CoproductIn (s = s) C
      (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, A))
      (idpath s))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
     (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s))
 abstract (now intros A B f; cbn; rewrite (CoproductOfArrowsIn _ _ (CC _ _ (λ _, A)))).

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s
⟹ functor_identity sortToC

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C

BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

s: sort
nat_trans_data (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
  (functor_identity sortToC)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_nat_trans (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
  (functor_identity sortToC) 
  ?t

TC: Terminal C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

  (functor_identity sortToC)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

A: sortToC
sortToC ⟦ (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A,
functor_identity sortToC A ⟧

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort

TC: Terminal C

  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
