sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
t: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
p: s = t
C ⟦ projSortToC s A, functor_identity sortToC A t ⟧

      exact (transportf (λ z, C ⟦ pr1 A s , z ⟧) (maponpaths (pr1 A) p) (identity _)).
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
is_nat_trans ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
  (functor_identity sortToC A)
  ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
    CoproductArrow (s = t) C
      (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
         (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
      (λ p : s = t,
       transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
         (maponpaths (pr1 A) p) (identity (pr1 A s))))
   :
   nat_trans_data ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
     (functor_identity sortToC A))
 abstract (intros a b []; now rewrite id_left, (functor_id A), id_right).
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_nat_trans (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
  (functor_identity sortToC)
  ((λ A : sortToC,
    make_nat_trans ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
      (functor_identity sortToC A)
      ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        CoproductArrow (s = t) C
          (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
             (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
          (λ p : s = t,
           transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
             (maponpaths (pr1 A) p)
             (identity (pr1 A s))))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
         (functor_identity sortToC A))
      (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof0 s A))
   :
   nat_trans_data (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
     (functor_identity sortToC))
 abstract (intros A B F;
    apply nat_trans_eq_alt; intros t; cbn;
    rewrite precompWithCoproductArrow, postcompWithCoproductArrow;
    apply CoproductArrowUnique; intros []; cbn;
    now rewrite id_left, (CoproductInCommutes _ _ _ (CC _ _ (λ _, pr1 A s))), id_right).

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
form_adjunction (hat_functor s) (projSortToC s)
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
     (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s)
     ((λ A : C,
       CoproductIn (s = s) C
         (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, A))
         (idpath s))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
        (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s))
     (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof s))
  (make_nat_trans (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
     (functor_identity sortToC)
     ((λ A : sortToC,
       make_nat_trans
         ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
         (functor_identity sortToC A)
         ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
           CoproductArrow (s = t) C
             (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
                (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
             (λ p : s = t,
              transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
                (maponpaths (pr1 A) p)
                (identity (pr1 A s))))
          :
          nat_trans_data
            ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
            (functor_identity sortToC A))
         (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof0 s A))
      :
      nat_trans_data (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
        (functor_identity sortToC))
     (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof1 s))
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ a : C,
# (hat_functor s)
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
     (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s)
     ((λ A : C,
       CoproductIn (s = s) C
         (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, A))
         (idpath s))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
        (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s))
     (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof s) a)
· make_nat_trans (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
    (functor_identity sortToC)
    ((λ A : sortToC,
      make_nat_trans
        ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
        (functor_identity sortToC A)
        ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          CoproductArrow (s = t) C
            (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
               (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
            (λ p : s = t,
             transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
               (maponpaths (pr1 A) p)
               (identity (pr1 A s))))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
           (functor_identity sortToC A))
        (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof0 s A))
     :
     nat_trans_data (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
       (functor_identity sortToC))
    (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof1 s)
    (hat_functor s a) = identity (hat_functor s a)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ b : sortToC,
make_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
  (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s)
  ((λ A : C,
    CoproductIn (s = s) C
      (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, A))
      (idpath s))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
     (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s))
  (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof s) 
  (projSortToC s b)
· # (projSortToC s)
    (make_nat_trans (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
       (functor_identity sortToC)
       ((λ A : sortToC,
         make_nat_trans
           ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
           (functor_identity sortToC A)
           ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
             CoproductArrow 
               (s = t) C
               (CC (s = t) 
                  (Hsort s t)
                  (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
               (λ p : s = t,
                transportf 
                  (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
                  (maponpaths (pr1 A) p)
                  (identity (pr1 A s))))
            :
            nat_trans_data
              ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
              (functor_identity sortToC A))
           (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof0 s A))
        :
        nat_trans_data (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
          (functor_identity sortToC))
       (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof1 s) b) =
identity (projSortToC s b)

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ a : C,
# (hat_functor s)
  (make_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
     (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s)
     ((λ A : C,
       CoproductIn (s = s) C
         (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, A))
         (idpath s))
      :
      nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
        (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s))
     (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof s) a)
· make_nat_trans (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
    (functor_identity sortToC)
    ((λ A : sortToC,
      make_nat_trans
        ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
        (functor_identity sortToC A)
        ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
          CoproductArrow (s = t) C
            (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
               (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
            (λ p : s = t,
             transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
               (maponpaths (pr1 A) p)
               (identity (pr1 A s))))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
           (functor_identity sortToC A))
        (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof0 s A))
     :
     nat_trans_data (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
       (functor_identity sortToC))
    (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof1 s)
    (hat_functor s a) = identity (hat_functor s a)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
c: C
t: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
CoproductOfArrows (s = t) C
  (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t) (λ _ : s = t, c))
  (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
     (λ _ : s = t,
      CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)))
  (λ _ : s = t,
   CoproductIn (s = s) C
     (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c))
     (idpath s))
· CoproductArrow (s = t) C
    (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
       (λ _ : s = t,
        CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)))
    (λ p : s = t,
     transportf
       (λ z : C,
        C ⟦ CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c), z
        ⟧)
       (maponpaths
          (λ s0 : sort,
           CC (s = s0) (Hsort s s0) (λ _ : s = s0, c))
          p)
       (identity
          (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)))) =
identity (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t) (λ _ : s = t, c))

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
c: C
t: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
CoproductArrow (s = t) C
  (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t) (λ _ : s = t, c))
  (λ i : s = t,
   CoproductIn (s = s) C
     (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c))
     (idpath s)
   · transportf
       (λ z : C,
        C ⟦ CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c), z
        ⟧)
       (maponpaths
          (λ s0 : sort,
           CC (s = s0) (Hsort s s0) (λ _ : s = s0, c))
          i)
       (identity
          (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)))) =
identity (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t) (λ _ : s = t, c))

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
c: C
t: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
CoproductIn (s = s) C
  (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)) (idpath s)
· identity (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)) =
CoproductIn (s = s) C
  (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)) (idpath s)
· transportf
    (λ z : C,
     C ⟦ CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c), z ⟧)
    (maponpaths
       (λ s0 : sort,
        CC (s = s0) (Hsort s s0) (λ _ : s = s0, c))
       (idpath s))
    (identity
       (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, c)))

    now rewrite !id_right.
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
∏ b : sortToC,
make_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
  (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s)
  ((λ A : C,
    CoproductIn (s = s) C
      (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, A))
      (idpath s))
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
     (hat_functor s ∙ projSortToC s))
  (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof s) (projSortToC s b)
· # (projSortToC s)
    (make_nat_trans (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
       (functor_identity sortToC)
       ((λ A : sortToC,
         make_nat_trans
           ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
           (functor_identity sortToC A)
           ((λ t : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
             CoproductArrow (s = t) C
               (CC (s = t) (Hsort s t)
                  (λ _ : s = t, projSortToC s A))
               (λ p : s = t,
                transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
                  (maponpaths (pr1 A) p)
                  (identity (pr1 A s))))
            :
            nat_trans_data
              ((projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s) A)
              (functor_identity sortToC A))
           (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof0 s A))
        :
        nat_trans_data (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functor s)
          (functor_identity sortToC))
       (is_left_adjoint_hat_subproof1 s) b) =
identity (projSortToC s b)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
A: sortToC
CoproductIn (s = s) C
  (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, pr1 A s))
  (idpath s)
· CoproductArrow (s = s) C
    (CC (s = s) (Hsort s s) (λ _ : s = s, pr1 A s))
    (λ p : s = s,
     transportf (λ z : C, C ⟦ pr1 A s, z ⟧)
       (maponpaths (pr1 A) p) (identity (pr1 A s))) =
identity (pr1 A s)

    now rewrite (CoproductInCommutes _ _ _ (CC _ _ (λ _, pr1 A s))).
Qed.


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_omega_cocont (post_comp_functor (hat_functor s))


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC

(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
s: sort
is_omega_cocont (post_comp_functor (hat_functor s))

apply is_omega_cocont_post_composition_functor, is_left_adjoint_hat.
Defined.


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xst: list (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cocont (hat_exp_functor_list xst)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

BC: BinCoproducts C

       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,

 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xst: list (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cocont
  (post_comp_functor (hat_functor (pr2 xst)))

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xst: list (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cocont (exp_functor_list (pr1 xst))
 apply is_omega_cocont_exp_functor_list.
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xst: list (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cocont
  (post_comp_functor (hat_functor (pr2 xst)))
 apply is_omega_cocont_post_comp_hat_functor.
Defined.

(** The functor obtained from a multisorted binding signature is omega-cocontinuous *)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
is_omega_cocont (MultiSortedSigToFunctor M)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
is_omega_cocont (MultiSortedSigToFunctor M)

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
∏ i : ops sort M,
is_omega_cocont
  (hat_exp_functor_list (arity sort M i))

  intros op; apply is_omega_cocont_hat_exp_functor_list.
Defined.


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
is_omega_cocont (MultiSortedSigToSignature M)


sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= SortIndexing.sort_cat sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
make_sortToC:= λ f : sort → C,
SortIndexing.make_sortToC sort Hsort C f: (sort → C) → sortToC
make_sortToC_mor:= λ (ξ ξ' : sortToC)
(fam : ∏ s : sort,
       C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧),
SortIndexing.make_sortToC_mor sort
  Hsort C ξ ξ' fam: ∏ ξ ξ' : sortToC,
(∏ s : sort,
 C ⟦ pr1 ξ s, pr1 ξ' s ⟧)
→ sortToC ⟦ ξ, ξ' ⟧
BCsortToC:= SortIndexing.BCsortToC sort Hsort C BC: BinCoproducts sortToC
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
BPsortToCC:= SortIndexing.BPsortToCC sort Hsort C BP: BinProducts sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
EsortToCC: Exponentials BPsortToCC
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
is_omega_cocont (MultiSortedSigToSignature M)

  apply is_omega_cocont_MultiSortedSigToFunctor.
Defined.

End omega_cocont.

End MBindingSig.
